summary: Results-oriented Digital Product Manager with over a decade of experience transforming digital marketing efforts and product landscapes. Backed by a strong foundation as a Full-Stack Web Developer, I have developed and guided software solutions that power core marketing infrastructure, supporting over $1 billion in annual revenue. My expertise spans from technical implementation to strategic leadership, consistently delivering innovative solutions, optimizing operational efficiency, and effectively leading cross-functional teams.

careerHighlights.title: Revenue-Supporting Software Leadership
careerHighlights.description: As Digital Product Manager at Brightland Homes, spearheaded the development of a custom CMS (ARC) and pivotal corporate websites supporting over $1 billion in annual revenue.

careerHighlights.title: Major Cost Savings Initiatives
careerHighlights.description: Achieved $299,000 savings from a 2022 TV signage platform transformation, $50,000 annually via Google Maps API optimization, $40,000 by leading in-house development, and $30,000 annually from reduced vendor dependency.

careerHighlights.title: User Engagement & Performance Boost
careerHighlights.description: Doubled PageSpeed Insights scores from 30 to 60 points and increased user engagement time by 40% for a custom corporate website.

careerHighlights.title: Marketing Productivity and Lead Generation
careerHighlights.description: Improved marketing productivity by 15% through strategic HubSpot CRM enhancements and increased leads by 10% via expertly crafted integrations and dynamic landing pages.

careerHighlights.title: Full-Stack Technical Expertise & Integrations
careerHighlights.description: Engineered robust integrations with HubSpot, Zillow, Realtor.com, Facebook, and Google Ads using Node.js Express, significantly enhancing lead generation and data synchronization.

careerHighlights.title: E-commerce Growth Success
careerHighlights.description: Drove a 259% sales increase within the first three months at Avacomtech Inc. by optimizing product listings. Expanded sales channels at Ufeelgood LLC, increasing revenue by an average of 30% year-over-year.
